title: Cleaners of Vehicles and Equipment
description: Wash or otherwise clean vehicles, machinery, and other equipment. Use such materials as water, cleaning agents, brushes, cloths, and hoses.

tasks.text: Rinse objects and place them on drying racks or use cloth, squeegees, or air compressors to dry surfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply paints, dyes, polishes, reconditioners, waxes, or masking materials to vehicles to preserve, protect, or restore color or condition.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Clean and polish vehicle windows.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive vehicles to or from workshops or customers' workplaces or homes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scrub, scrape, or spray machine parts, equipment, or vehicles, using scrapers, brushes, clothes, cleaners, disinfectants, insecticides, acid, abrasives, vacuums, or hoses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect parts, equipment, or vehicles for cleanliness, damage, and compliance with standards or regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Mix cleaning solutions, abrasive compositions, or other compounds, according to formulas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain inventories of supplies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pre-soak or rinse machine parts, equipment, or vehicles by immersing objects in cleaning solutions or water, manually or using hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn valves or disconnect hoses to eliminate water, cleaning solutions, or vapors from machinery or tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Turn valves or handles on equipment to regulate pressure or flow of water, air, steam, or abrasives from sprayer nozzles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sweep, shovel, or vacuum loose debris or salvageable scrap into containers and remove containers from work areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor operation of cleaning machines and stop machines or notify supervisors when malfunctions occur.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Press buttons to activate cleaning equipment or machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect hoses or lines to pumps or other equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean the plastic work inside cars, using paintbrushes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Disassemble and reassemble machines or equipment or remove and reattach vehicle parts or trim, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lubricate machinery, vehicles, or equipment or perform minor repairs or adjustments, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Transport materials, equipment, or supplies to or from work areas, using carts or hoists.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fit boot spoilers, side skirts, or mud flaps to cars.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
